ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "sequence_accession" TEXT /* Accession number or unique identifier for the sequence */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the taxon classification of the sequence */,
  "subgenus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subgenus classification of the sequence */,
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the isolate information of the sequence */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the sequence (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the sequence */,
  "sequence_description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of the sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sequence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_subgenus_id FOREIGN KEY ("subgenus_id") REFERENCES subgenuses ("subgenus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_isolate_id FOREIGN KEY ("isolate_id") REFERENCES isolates ("isolate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxons ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxons" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "taxon_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon */,
  "taxon_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxon in the taxonomic hierarchy (e.g., species, genus) */,
  "parent_taxon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent taxon in the hierarchy */,
  "taxon_common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the taxon */,
  "taxon_rank_order" INTEGER /* Rank order of the taxon in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subgenuses" (
  "subgenus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subgenus */,
  "subgenus_name" TEXT /* Name of the subgenus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subgenus */,
  "subgenus_common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the subgenus */,
  "subgenus_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the subgenus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subgenus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isolates" (
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isolate */,
  "isolate_name" TEXT /* Name of the isolate */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the isolate */,
  "isolate_common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the isolate */,
  "isolate_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the isolate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence being annotated */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "annotation_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_annotations_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., FASTA, GenBank) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the sequence file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_files_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_versions_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence being linked */,
  "related_sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related sequence */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., homologous, derived from) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "link_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the link */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_links_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_links_related_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence being annotated */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the metadata */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_metadata_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sequence where the variant occurs */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., SNP, insertion, deletion) */,
  "variant_position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant in the sequence */,
  "variant_nucleotide" TEXT /* Nucleotide or amino acid of the variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "variant_creator" TEXT /* Creator of the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequence_variants_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES sequences ("sequence_id")
)
